misc: Might have trouble getting to the tee on time
biography: Jaakko, a celebrated member of Hirsala Golf, is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée. Known for his discerning palate as a wine connoisseur, Jaakko brings a unique blend of sophistication and passion to the greens.

With four appearances in past Hector Trophée tournaments, Jaakko is still pursuing his first victory in the event. While he has yet to hoist the Hector Trophée or claim the Victor Trophy, his dedication to the sport is undeniable.

Off the course, Jaakko's relaxed demeanor sometimes translates to a near miss with punctuality, adding a touch of suspense to his tee times. Despite this, his fellow competitors and fans alike appreciate his sportsmanship and camaraderie. He will not be participating in Hector Trophée 2026.
We look forward to seeing Jaakko back on the course soon, hopefully battling it out for the top spot.
